title: Give Me 10 Mins and I'll Save You Millions of Claude Tokens
summary: Prompt caching in Claude enables users to save millions of tokens weekly by caching input data and reusing it across requests. The technique involves understanding cache costs, cache TTL behavior, and practices that preserve cache state to maximize token efficiency.
